name: Super Starmon

signature_move.name: Halley Squall
signature_move.description: Summons countless meteors to rain down upon the enemy from overhead.

description: The space warrior Starmon turned into this Perfect level Mutation Digimon. It raised its self-satisfaction and clothed itself in a flashy outfit, making its debut as a star. Although it means to use its sunglasses as a disguise to conceal its superstar identity, they do not help at all. Its Special Move, " Halley Squall ", involves summoning countless meteors to rain down upon the enemy from overhead.
